summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No canonical is selected because the job is explicitly not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with route_security; all other listed PRs are kept independently for normal maintainer/author review without close, merge, label, comment, or fix actions.

actions.reason: Unique draft Telegram runtime PR with proof blockers; no duplicate or superseding canonical is established.
Focused standalone edit-tool improvement; keep for normal maintainer review rather than classifying as duplicate or merge candidate.
Standalone contributor PR with unresolved review/check blockers; not low-signal, not duplicate, and not safe for closure or merge planning.
Distinct compatibility/message-delivery fix with active author follow-up; keep independently for review/proof handling.
Auth override and credential-adjacent behavior must be handled by central OpenClaw security review, not ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Maintainer-owned standalone cleanup; no duplicate/superseded evidence and no allowed merge action.
Security-boundary-labeled broad plugin/model failure hook work should route to central security/maintainer handling.
Standalone Telegram media path fix; no duplicate, supersession, or low-signal closure evidence.
Related plugin surface but a distinct event/API change; keep independently rather than inventing a canonical.
Standalone Docker setup repair; no evidence supports duplicate, superseded, low-signal, close, or merge action in this plan-only job.
